project_name: Smart Digital Solutions by GIT NFT GHANA LTD

theme.description: A high-impact 'Tech-Luxury' aesthetic. Light mode serves as the trust anchor for readability (Service details, Pricing), while Dark mode (Navy/Midnight Blue) is used for 'Emotional' sections (Hero, Call-to-Action, Footer) to create depth and premium contrast. The 'Smart' aspect is visualized through abstract glowing orbs and clean data visualizations.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-800 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-blue-50/50 rounded-lg
buttons.whatsapp_float: fixed bottom-8 right-8 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16

cards.base: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300 overflow-hidden
cards.glass: bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-lg rounded-2xl
cards.pricing_featured: bg-slate-900 text-white border-blue-500/50 ring-4 ring-blue-500/10 scale-105 relative z-10 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 transition-all

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-slate-100 z-40 h-20 flex items-center

rtl_support.instruction: Use 'rtl:space-x-reverse', 'rtl:text-right' etc. Ensure 'dir=rtl' attribute is set dynamically on the html tag when Arabic is selected.

hero_abstract.alt: Abstract blue glowing orb representing digital intelligence

ghana_cityscape.alt: Aerial view of modern Accra city

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure white text on blue buttons has 4.5:1 ratio. Use Slate-600 on White for body text.
accessibility.interactive_elements: All interactive elements must have :focus-visible styles (ring-2 ring-blue-500 ring-offset-2).
accessibility.rtl_compliance: Ensure layout mirrors correctly for Arabic. Icons like 'arrow-right' should flip or be swapped for 'arrow-left'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Navbar and Footer.
Create a 'LanguageSwitcher' component that toggles 'dir' attribute on <html> and translates content (mock translation keys for now).
Use standard <a> tags for external WhatsApp links, but React Router <Link> for internal navigation.
Implement the 'Why Website' section using a Bento Grid (CSS Grid).
For the Admin Dashboard, use a Sidebar layout (left nav, right content) with a simple data table for messages.
Ensure the 'WhatsApp' button is a global floating component.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
